import pytest
from source import find_first_in_sorted

def test_find_first_in_sorted_not_found_boundary():
    """The function should return -1 when the target is greater than all elements.
    The buggy implementation incorrectly accesses arr[len(arr)] and raises IndexError."""
    arr = [1, 2, 3]
    target = 4
    result = find_first_in_sorted(arr, target)
    assert result == -1, f"Expected -1 for target {target} not in array, got {result}"
